properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v2 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: How majestic is your name In all the earth, Your name is strong and mighty, Your name is glorious and great, In him we are saved.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The name of Jesus higher than other names King of all kings, No other name like his The name of Jesus Higher than other names, Alpha and omega, No other name like his.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Your name like sweet perfume Poured upon my soul, ohooho, In your name we overcome, In his name there is victory, His name is powerful.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Every other god they are deader than dead Jesus died and rose again, We lift him higher In your name every knee shall bow In your name all men are saved We call upon the name.
